title: What Is an AI Operating System? (And Why Every Business Will Need One)
summary: Liam Ottley outlines AI Operating System (AIOS) as a layered methodology for businesses to shift focus from operational tasks to strategic growth. AIOS emphasizes automation and augmentation through five layers built around existing business models, with success measured by away-from-desk autonomy, task automation percentage, and revenue per employee.
